HGSS.479.0000:
A sleeping Pokémon is lying in the
middle of the road.\f
It’s a fantastic opportunity to get it,
but how do you wake it up?
HGSS.479.0001:
There used to be a sleeping Pokémon
lying in the middle of the road.\r
But it seems to have disappeared.
HGSS.479.0002:
The Fast Ship is a great place to
meet and battle Trainers.
HGSS.479.0003:
Oh? You have some Badges I’ve never
seen before.\f
Oh, I get it. You got them in Johto.
